front.title: Using GOST Cryptographic Algorithms for JWT security

abstract.t: This specification registers cryptographic algorithms and identifiers for GOST R 34.10 digital signatures and public keys, GOST R 34.11 hash functions, GOST 34.12 encryption algorithms to be used with JSON Web Signatures (JWS), JSON Web Encryption (JWE), and JSON Web Keys (JWK) specifications.
